name: Severance
overview: Mark leads a team of office workers whose memories have been surgically divided between their work and personal lives, until an unexpected colleague shakes the system.

name: Foundation
overview: A complex saga of humans scattered across planets fighting to save civilization, based on the award-winning novels by Isaac Asimov.

name: The Expanse
overview: A disparate band of antiheroes unravel a vast conspiracy that threatens the Solar System's fragile state of detente in a future where humanity has colonized the planets.

name: Andor
overview: In an era filled with danger, deception and intrigue, Cassian Andor embarks on the path that will turn him into a rebel hero during the years before the Galactic Civil War.

name: The Mandalorian
overview: After the fall of the Empire, a lone gunfighter makes his way through the lawless galaxy with a mysterious foundling child in tow.

name: Stranger Things
overview: When a young boy vanishes, a small town uncovers a mystery involving secret experiments, terrifying supernatural forces and one strange little girl.

name: The Witcher
overview: Geralt of Rivia, a mutated monster-hunter for hire, journeys toward his destiny in a turbulent world where people often prove more wicked than beasts.

name: Black Mirror
overview: An anthology series exploring a twisted, high-tech multiverse where humanity's greatest innovations and darkest instincts collide.

name: Westworld
overview: A dark odyssey about the dawn of artificial consciousness and the evolution of sin, set at the intersection of the near future and the reimagined past.

name: The Last of Us
overview: Twenty years after modern civilization has been destroyed, a hardened survivor is hired to smuggle a teenage girl out of an oppressive quarantine zone.

name: Loki
overview: After stealing the Tesseract, Loki finds himself called before the Time Variance Authority and must help fix the timeline he broke while keeping his own future intact.

name: Dark
overview: A missing child sets four families on a frantic hunt for answers as they unearth a mind-bending mystery that spans three generations and the secrets of time itself.

name: Silo
overview: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant underground silo, bound by rules they believe protect them, until one engineer begins to question everything.

name: For All Mankind
overview: In an alternate history, the global space race never ended after the Soviet Union beat the United States to the Moon, reshaping decades of technological progress.

name: House of the Dragon
overview: The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than fifteen dragons under its yoke, but most empires crack from such heights.

name: The Wheel of Time
overview: A powerful woman discovers a group of five young people, one of whom is prophesied to either save or destroy the world, and sets out to guide them.

name: Star Trek: Strange New Worlds
overview: Captain Christopher Pike and the crew of the starship Enterprise explore new worlds throughout the galaxy in the years before the original five-year mission.

name: Fallout
overview: The denizens of a luxury fallout shelter are forced to return to the irradiated hellscape their ancestors left behind, and are shocked to discover a surprisingly complex world.

name: Arcane
overview: Amid the stark discord of twin cities Piltover and Zaun, two sisters fight on rival sides of a war between magic technologies and clashing convictions.

name: Devs
overview: A young software engineer investigates the secretive development division of her employer, a cutting-edge tech company, which she believes is behind her boyfriend's disappearance.

name: Raised by Wolves
overview: Two androids are tasked with raising human children on a mysterious virgin planet, but as the colony threatens to be torn apart by religious differences, they struggle to control their charges.

name: Scavengers Reign
overview: The survivors of a stranded cargo freighter struggle to stay alive on a beautiful yet deadly alien planet teeming with strange and dangerous lifeforms.
